description: Replace trialIds with the exact immutable 180-trial subset used to produce RepoQA Table 3(b) in the SBES 2026 tool paper.
notes: Exact paper reproduction requires explicit trial IDs; implicit filters are intentionally rejected.
The selected IDs must resolve to exactly 45 trials for each required configuration.
Expected values are verification fixtures only and are never used to select or compute trials.
Do not claim exact Table 3(b) reproduction until build_table_3b.py --verify succeeds.
